facebook.caption:
Tourists book the big resort boats. Locals point you here.

Kimie's Tours runs snorkeling, diving, and hiking out of a tiny alley off Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. 260 reviews. Every single one a 5-star. That ratio doesn't happen by accident.

Small groups. People who actually know these waters. The kind of trip you describe for years.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
